class.name: FmodGeometryMeshToolsPlugin
class.brief_description: Editor tool for creating FMOD geometry nodes from selected meshes.
class.description: FmodGeometryMeshToolsPlugin adds editor actions for selected [MeshInstance3D] nodes. It can create [FmodGeometryInstance3D] children configured for mesh or collision-shape based FMOD occlusion. This class is registered for editor integration and is normally managed by the plugin automatically.
